results.rendered_html:
anu-√dṛś (ind.p. -dṛśya,  RV. x, 130, 7 ) to survey, behold;
to keep in view or in mind, to foresee:
Caus. P. -darśayati, to show, tell, teach:
Pass. -dṛśyate (also perf. Ā. -dadṛśe,  RV. viii, 1, 34 ), to become or be visible.

results.rendered_html:
anudṛś 1 P. To survey, behold; to keep in view or mind, see in prospect; na ca śreyo'nupaśyāmi hatvā svajanamāhave  Bg. 1. 31 ;  Bh. 3. 3. 
— Caus. To show, tell, inform as follows; senāpatiḥ putramagnimitraṃ pariṣvajya anudarśayati  M. 5  writes or informs as follows.
